q: Which payment methods are growing fastest this month compared to last month? Show percentage growth.
sql: SELECT payment_method, COALESCE(((SUM(CASE WHEN transaction_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN transaction_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AND transaction_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN transaction_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AND transaction_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) * 100, 0) AS growth_percentage FROM silver_transactions WHERE transaction_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 2 MONTH) AND transaction_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL 1 MONTH AND payment_method IS NOT NULL GROUP BY payment_method ORDER BY growth_percentage DESC;

q: Which 5 merchants have the highest refund rate? Show refund count and total transaction count.
sql: SELECT merchant_id, merchant_name, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'REFUNDED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS refund_count, COUNT(*) AS total_transaction_count, (SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'REFUNDED' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)) * 100 AS refund_rate FROM silver_transactions JOIN merchants m ON silver_transactions.merchant_id = m.merchant_id WHERE quality_flag = 'PASS' AND transaction_date BETWEEN DATE '2023-01-01' AND DATE '2023-12-31' AND status IS NOT NULL AND status!= '' AND merchant_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY merchant_id, merchant_name ORDER BY refund_rate DESC LIMIT 5;
